title: Always-on automatic match data and historical replay runtime
required_validation_commands: pnpm exec prisma migrate diff --from-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script
expected_results: Worker is independent from API lifecycle and uses one advisory-lock-held replica.
Discovery and adaptive polling are env-driven and fail closed without real competition configuration.
Persisted score, odds, events, freshness, and health survive agent-off, API-off, and worker restart scenarios.
Replay returns HTTP 200 no_data for missing timelines and never exposes future snapshots or raw provider payloads.
Web refreshes without resetting selected state and keeps stale/error indicators visible.
Prisma diff is empty and no migration or seed is applied.
